race.comment: AETHELWULF (1) returns from a 24-week spell. Raced just once in the maiden prep and did a great job to finish a close second at Goulburn over 1500m, coming from near the tail on straightening. Two recent trials should have him primed to pick up where he left off. AMONOTONE (7) was a bit flat first-up on a heavy track at Hawkesbury. Watch for a sharper performance on firmer ground with blinkers applied. GRIDLOCK (13) caught the eye at Hawkesbury last time and should shine over an extra 300m on a roomier track. AUDACIOUSLY FRANK (3) is a three-year-old gelding making his debut. By Frankel and trained by Gai and Adrian so must be kept safe.
